name: International Ranger Corp.
summary: International Ranger Corp. operates as a uranium exploration company in Canada and the United States. The company holds interest in the Four Corners Project, which include ten Utah State Metalliferous leases covering an area of approximately 6,580.24 acres and 2,027 unpatented lode mining claims of 40,540 acres located in Emery County, Utah; and Koorsharem Uranium Prospect that consists of 6 mining claims located in Piute County, Utah. It also holds interest in Whiskey Gap Uranium Project comprising 2 metallic mineral permits each containing an area of approximately 36 square miles located in Southern Alberta, Canada; and Foghorn Polymetallic Project, which consists of 3,129.5 hectares mineral claims located in Kamloops, Canada. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Vancouver, Canada.
